_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular-guided therapy predictions reveal drug resistance phenotypes and treatment alternatives in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: NF02.2, an MPNST-derived cell line (ATCC [ 45 ]) showed significant and consistent expression of ABCC1. Quantitative real-time PCR confirms the high level of expression
details: Shows significant and consistent expression of ABCC1, confirmed by quantitative real-time PCR relative to benign neurofibroma-derived cells
